extraction_reasoning: The litigation table contains only an “Against our Company” row: criminal proceedings are Nil, tax proceedings are 7, statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil, disciplinary actions are Nil, and material civil litigations are Nil; there are no “By” rows to count. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹143.10 million, consisting of the disclosed tax matters, and converts to ₹14.31 crore at ₹10 million per crore; no subsidiary or promoter/director matters are listed. The contingent-liabilities disclosure states a consolidated total of ₹143.10 million as of March 31, 2023, which converts to ₹14.31 crore; the separate ₹122.84 million capital commitment is excluded. The company-wide Overall customer concentration for the full Financial Year 2023 is 33.47% for the top five customers and 44.28% for the top ten customers, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations; the API and Formulations figures are segment-level and were not used. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ in millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
